name: gliding-nz-training
description: This Classic Wordpress theme was created for GNZ's training syllabus website. I first used Gemini 3 Pro to build a wireframe (because I suck at design), then used GPT-5-Codex and Claude Sonnet 4.6 to build this theme and iterate on the UX (with some professional supervision and manual tweaks).

scripts.analyse: docker compose -f ../../../../docker-compose.yml exec -T wordpress sh -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/gliding-nz-training && php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --memory-limit=512M'
